creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: I think the problem is in r363415.  It converted some lockmgr code to use atomic_fcmpset instead of atomic_cmpset.  The former can fail spuriously on LL/SC platforms, so a tryxlock operation can fail even when the buf is unlocked.  lockmgr should take care to retry if fcmpset fails but returns the "expected" value.
